programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES

programme.desc: Mum and Dad construct their own magic claw machine at home for Bluey and Bingo to play with, but Dad makes sure winning isn't easy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey accidentally upsets Bingo, and must do everything in her power to make her happy again.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: When Mavis gets a fang transplant from cousin Klaus, she tries to figure out his ulterior motive.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Kiff finally meets her mom's old college friends.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
programme.desc: When an oracle from the wizard world shows up on Billie's doorstep and predicts that Billie will destroy the big summer carnival, Billie stops at nothing to change the future.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn….

programme.title: Iron Squad W

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. Join award-winning Malaysian actress Siti Saleha and her husband as they explore the city by day and venture into the night, discovering its vibrant culture and hidden treasures.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.desc: Adapted from a novel, the story tells the story of how Yun Shen (Cheng Yi), a researcher at a pharmaceutical company and Zhu Jiu (Zhang Yu Xi), a surgeon embarking on a humanitarian medical rescue, got off the wrong foot, but eventually found love.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Siska (Ersya Aurelia) was asked by Daniel to be able to cook, because Daniel's family has a restaurant business and his mother gave a condition that Daniel's wife must be good at cooking. Siska finally asks Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex who is a chef and has a culinary business, for help.

programme.title: Mudik Jangan Bawa Hati Nanti Sulit Kembali
programme.desc: Intan and her partner, Dodo, received a mandate, namely someone who left a luxury car in their office for 2 weeks. Then Intan and Dodo planned to take the car back home. Dodo pretended to be Intan's driver in his hometown. Intan claims to be a rich man. On the other hand, Dodo claims to be the owner of the car and flirts with girls in the village, even though Dodo is actually a car mechanic.

programme.title: SUMPAH I LOVE YOU FULL
programme.desc: Blaming arranged marriages after witnessing her aunt's divorce, Putri vowed never to be set up in one herself. On her first day at work, Putri didn't make a good impression; instead, she scolded a director at the company where she worked named Riko. Riko deliberately gave Putri a lot of work to do. When he got home, Riko was shocked to find out that the person he had been working with was Boi's da

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a hick girl. Dara comes to Jakarta to find her biological mother, but instead she meets Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). Meanwhile, Eza is apparently told by Eyang, to make Dara his wife, even though Eza has a very beautiful and fashionable girlfriend.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Yang Manis Suka Bikin Hati Meringis
programme.desc: Farel (Erdin Werdrayana) is a delivery boy, but while delivering flowers to a customer, he meets Tari (Djihan Ranti) and is stunned by her beauty. It turns out that behind it Tari is so fierce that it makes Farel surprised.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mencintaimu Ibarat Hutang Makin Ditagih Makin Berbunga
programme.desc: Esih (Jennifer Eve), who has just become a debt collector, is guided by her boss Andra (Qausar Harta Yudana). At first, Esih admits she is not capable of being a debt collector. Andra then teaches her how to do the job and even gives her a hat as part of her work attribute. Eventually, Esih proves to Andra that she can handle the job, thanks to her self-defense skills.
